issue_body: After updating to chalk 5.x, our application build fails with a `ReferenceError: navigator is not defined`. This happens because the vendored `supports-color` package does not handle `navigator` being `undefined` in non-browser environments. The latest standalone `supports-color` version (10.0.0) already handles this correctly, so the vendored copy in chalk needs to be updated to guard against `navigator` not existing before accessing its properties.
